nasb.text: Therefore, the anger of the Lord burned against that land, to bring upon it every curse which is written in this book;

esv.text: Therefore the anger of the Lord was kindled against this land, bringing upon it all the curses written in this book,

cnv.text: 所以耶和華向這地大發烈怒，把這書上所寫的一切咒詛都降在這地上；

ccb.text: 因此，耶和华向这片土地发怒，把这书上的一切咒诅都降在这里。
